team.invite.description: Send an email invite to add a new member to your team.
team.invite.max_users_reached: You have reached the maximum number of users for your plan. Upgrade to add more members.
team.invite.role_admin_desc: Can manage members and team settings.
team.invite.role_member_desc: Can create and edit resources, but cannot manage members.
team.invite.title: Invite New Member
